sourceMovie.title: Fidelity
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Fidelity works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Closer
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Fidelity clicked for you, Closer (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Before We Go
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Fidelity clicked for you, Before We Go (2014) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Fidelity?
faq.answer: Try Closer, Before We Go, One Hour Photo—each shares DNA with Fidelity while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Fidelity?
faq.answer: Fidelity (2019) is best described as Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Fidelity worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
